query_normalized: evaluating the impact of data scaling on statistical test sensitivity statistics
rationale: The paper focuses on asymptotic properties of combinatorial statistics (Mahonian statistics, Galois numbers) in finite vector spaces and symmetric groups, which is a topic in algebraic combinatorics rather than the empirical evaluation of statistical test sensitivity under data scaling. It does not measure statistical power, Type I/II error rates, or the impact of sample size scaling on hypothesis testing performance, failing to meet any of the inclusion criteria (a-f) for the user's specific re
